110101.english: Paul and Timotheus, the servants of Jesus Christ, to all the saints in Christ Jesus which are at Philippi, with the bishops and deacons:
110101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹᏗ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏩᏂᏅᏏᏙᎯ, ᏫᏙᏍᏙᏪᎳᏏ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏈᎵᎩᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᏙᏍᎦᏠᏯᏍᏗᎭ ᏗᏂᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏯᏙᎯᎯ;
110101.phonetic: Quo-la a-le Di-ma-di, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-wa-ni-nv-si-do-hi, wi-do-s-do-we-la-si na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa gv-wo-hi-yu-hi na-s-gi Qui-li-gi-yi a-ne-hi, do-s-ga-tlo-ya-s-di-ha di-ni-ga-ti-ya a-le a-ni-ya-do-hi-hi;

110102.english: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ.
110102.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏁ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
110102.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv, a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-ne U-ne-la-nv-hi i-gi-do-da, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

110103.english: I thank my God upon every remembrance of you,

110104.english: Always in every prayer of mine for you all making request with joy,
110104.cherokee: ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏂᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᏥᏔᏲᎯᎲ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏛ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ,
110104.phonetic: Ni-go-hi-lv ni-ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv ni-tsi-ta-yo-hi-hv ni-hi ni-tsi-v e-tsi-do-li-s-di-yi, u-li-he-li-s-di a-qua-da-nv-dv ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i,

110105.english: For your fellowship in the gospel from the first day until now;
110105.cherokee: ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᏖᏆᎶᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎢᎦ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏘ;
110105.phonetic: Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv i-tsa-te-qua-lo-sv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-sv-i, i-gv-yi-yi i-ga nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv go-hi i-ya-s-ti;

110106.english: Being confident of this very thing, that he which hath begun a good work in you will perform it until the day of Jesus Christ:
110106.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏆᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᎲᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎤᎴᏅᏛ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏰᎢᎸᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎵᏰᎵᎢᎶᎸ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ;
110106.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi su-da-le-gi ge-sv na-qua-dla-si-dv-e-hv-na, na-s-gi na o-s-dv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di u-le-nv-dv do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv-i na-s-gi u-ye-i-lv-s-di-yi gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li i-ga a-li-ye-li-i-lo-lv gv-di-s-gi;

110107.english: Even as it is meet for me to think this of you all, because I have you in my heart; inasmuch as both in my bonds, and in the defence and confirmation of the gospel, ye all are partakers of my grace.
110107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᏳᎪᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏰᎵᏎᏗᏱ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎩᎾᏫᏱ ᎢᏨᏍᏆᏂᎪᏛᎢ; ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᎥᏆᎸᎢᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏍᏗᎭ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎥᎩᏙᎵᎬᎢ.
110107.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-du-yu-go-di na-s-gi i-tsv-ye-li-se-di-yi ni-tsi-v-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv a-gi-na-wi-yi i-tsv-s-qua-ni-go-dv-i; na-s-quo-ye-no v-qua-lv-i-dv ge-sv-i, a-le tsi-s-de-li-s-gv a-le tsi-s-da-yi-di-s-gv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv ni-hi ni-tsi-v i-tse-la-di-s-di-ha gv-wa-ga-ti-ya v-gi-do-li-gv-i.

110108.english: For God is my record, how greatly I long after you all in the bowels of Jesus Christ.
110108.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᎦᏔᎯ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᏒᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
110108.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no a-qua-tse-li a-ga-ta-hi ni-ga-v i-tsv-ge-yu-sv-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-da-ge-yu-di gv-di-s-gv-i.

110109.english: And this I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in knowledge and in all judgment;
110109.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᏔᏲᎯᎭ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎠᏏ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
110109.phonetic: A-le tsi-ta-yo-hi-ha ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-tse-hv a-si u-tli i-ga-i u-ne-quo-tsv-s-di-yi u-li-tlo-ya-s-do-di-yi a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv, a-le ni-ga-v du-yu-go-dv go-li-s-di ge-sv-i;

110110.english: That ye may approve things that are excellent; that ye may be sincere and without offence till the day of Christ;
110110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏚᏓᎴᎿᎭᎥᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏣᏓᎿᎭᏍᏆᎶᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎠᎵᏱᎶᎸ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ;
110110.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsi-go-wa-dv-di-yi tsu-da-le-nv-dv du-da-le-hna-v-i; na-s-gi ni-tsa-tlo-na-s-dv-na i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le ni-tsa-da-hna-s-qua-lo-s-di-s-gv-na Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li i-ga a-li-yi-lo-lv gv-di-s-gi;

110111.english: Being filled with the fruits of righteousness, which are by Jesus Christ, unto the glory and praise of God.
110111.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110111.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsi-ka-li-tsv-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi du-yu-go-dv ge-sv u-da-le-nv-hi, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi, na-s-gi u-lv-quo-do-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i.

110112.english: But I would ye should understand, brethren, that the things which happened unto me have fallen out rather unto the furtherance of the gospel;
110112.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎫᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ ᎤᏁᏉᎢᏍᏗᏱᏉ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ;
110112.phonetic: A-se-no i-da-li-nv-tli a-qua-du-li-ha i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi na-s-gi gu-da-le-nv-dv na-qua-li-s-da-ne-lv-i u-ne-quo-i-s-di-yi-quo nu-wa-ne-lv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv;

110113.english: So that my bonds in Christ are manifest in all the palace, and in all other places;
110113.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏍᏛᏗᏍᎬ ᎥᏆᎸᎥᎢ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᏁᎸ ᏂᎬ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᏉ;
110113.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-s-dv-di-s-gv v-qua-lv-v-i u-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-ne-lv ni-gv gv-ni-ge-sv nu-li-s-ta-nv, a-le ni-gv-na-dv-quo;

110114.english: And many of the brethren in the Lord, waxing confident by my bonds, are much more bold to speak the word without fear.
110114.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎥᏆᎸᎥ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᏚᎾᎵᎪᏒ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎾᏂᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᏄᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎾᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᏗᏱ.
110114.phonetic: A-le a-ni-go-di-yu a-na-li-nv-tli U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-na-ne-lo-di v-qua-lv-v i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv du-na-li-go-sv du-na-da-nv-dv-i, u-tli i-ga-i na-ni-na-ye-s-gv-na nu-na-li-s-ta-nv ka-no-he-dv na-ni-s-ga-i-hv-na u-ni-no-he-di-yi.

110115.english: Some indeed preach Christ even of envy and strife; and some also of good will:
110115.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏛ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᏛᏳᎨᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᎭ, ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏒᎢ.
110115.phonetic: I-ga-dv u-do-hi-yu-hi a-dv-yu-ge-di ge-sv a-le a-di-sv-s-di ge-sv u-na-du-li-s-gv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ni-no-he-ha, i-ga-dv-no na-s-quo o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-sv-i.

110116.english: The one preach Christ of contention, not sincerely, supposing to add affliction to my bonds:
110116.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏑᎾᏓᎴᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎾᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎦ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᎭ ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗᏉ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏄᎾᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏯᏅᏗᎭ, ᎤᏂᏁᏉᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᎭ ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎥᏆᎸᎢᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110116.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi su-na-da-le-gi ge-sv a-na-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ga Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ni-no-he-ha a-di-sv-s-di-quo ge-sv u-na-du-li-s-gv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, v-tla-no nu-na-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-sv ya-nv-di-ha, u-ni-ne-quo-s-di-yi u-ni-ye-lv-ha tsi-gi-li-yo-gv v-qua-lv-i-dv ge-sv-i.

110117.english: But the other of love, knowing that I am set for the defence of the gospel.
110117.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎥᎩᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ.
110117.phonetic: A-ni-so-i-s-gi-ni gv-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, a-ni-ga-ta-ha-ye-no v-gi-ne-tse-lv-hi ge-sv a-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv.

110118.english: What then? notwithstanding, every way, whether in pretence, or in truth, Christ is preached; and I therein do rejoice, yea, and will rejoice.
110118.cherokee: ᎦᏙᎨᏃ?  ᎤᏁᎳᎩ, ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏱᎾᎾᏛᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏳᏂᏰᎸᎭ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ, ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎨᏍᏗ.
110118.phonetic: Ga-do-ge-no?  U-ne-la-gi, ni-ga-v-quo na-na-dv-ne-hv-i, na-s-quo a-se-quo-quo yi-na-na-dv-ne-ha, a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi yu-ni-ye-lv-ha, Ga-lo-ne-dv a-tsi-no-he-ha; a-le na-hna-ni ga-li-e-li-ga, v-v, a-le a-se ga-li-e-li-ge-s-di.

110119.english: For I know that this shall turn to my salvation through your prayer, and the supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,
110119.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᏭᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎥᎩᏁᎲᎢ;
110119.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no hi-a na-s-gi v-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi wu-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i ni-hi i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv nv-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni, a-le Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-da-nv-do v-gi-ne-hv-i;

110120.english: According to my earnest expectation and my hope, that in nothing I shall be ashamed, but that with all boldness, as always, so now also Christ shall be magnified in my body, whether it be by life, or by death.
110120.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎠᏋᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏂᎦᎥᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏥᏄᏍᏙᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎪᎯ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏥᏰᎸ ᎬᏗ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110120.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya u-tsa-ti a-qua-du-li-s-gv a-le u-du-gi a-quv-sv-i, na-s-gi ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di a-qua-de-ho-hi-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, ni-ga-v-quo-s-gi-ni ni-tsi-s-ga-i-hv-na ge-sv-i, tsi-nu-s-do-quo, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo go-hi, Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di tsi-ye-lv gv-di, na-s-quo gv-no-dv ge-sv a-le a-gi-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

110121.english: For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.
110121.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏰᏃ ᏯᏆᎴᏂᏙᎸ ᎦᎶᏅᏛ ᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗ, ᏯᎩᏲᎱᏒᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᏁᏉᏤᏗ.
110121.phonetic: A-si-ye-no ya-qua-le-ni-do-lv Ga-lo-nv-dv tsi-lv-quo-do-di, ya-gi-yo-hu-sv-no a-yv a-gi-ne-quo-tse-di.

110122.english: But if I live in the flesh, this is the fruit of my labour: yet what I shall choose I wot not.
110122.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᏯᏆᎴᏂᏙᎸ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᏗ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᎪᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏑᏰᏍᏗᏱ.
110122.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-que-da-lv ya-qua-le-ni-do-lv, hi-a na-s-gi a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-s-di da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-go-hv-i; a-le v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-qua-su-ye-s-di-yi.

110123.english: For I am in a strait betwixt two, having a desire to depart, and to be with Christ; which is far better:
110123.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏳ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎠᏆᏂᎩᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏤᎲ ᏩᏆᏕᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏛ ᎤᏟ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏥᎩ;
110123.phonetic: Ta-li-ye-no i-yu-da-le-gi ge-sv a-s-da-yi-yu na-qua-li-s-da-ne-ha, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di a-qua-du-li-s-gv a-qua-ni-gi-s-di-yi, a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv tse-hv wa-qua-de-di-yi; na-s-gi wu-da-go-na-dv-dv u-tli o-si-yu tsi-gi;

110124.english: Nevertheless to abide in the flesh is more needful for you.
110124.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏓᎸᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏆᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏟ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏂᎯ.
110124.phonetic: U-s-da-lv-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-qua-le-ni-da-s-di-yi u-tli o-si-yu i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di ni-hi.

110125.english: And having this confidence, I know that I shall abide and continue with you all for your furtherance and joy of faith;
110125.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏣᏉᎯᏳᎭ, ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᏆᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
110125.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a tsi-nu-s-di tsa-quo-hi-yu-ha, tsi-ga-ta-ha a-qua-le-ni-da-s-di-yi a-le ni-tsi-v i-tsv-ye-la-di-da-s-di-yi, na-s-gi i-tsi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi a-le i-tsa-li-he-li-s-di-yi i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i.

110126.english: That your rejoicing may be more abundant in Jesus Christ for me by my coming to you again.
110126.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎠᏴ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
110126.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-ne-quo-tsv-s-di-yi i-tsa-li-he-li-gv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, a-yv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv, na-s-gi ta-li-ne wi-tsv-lu-tse-di ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

110127.english: Only let your conversation be as it becometh the gospel of Christ: that whether I come and see you, or else be absent, I may hear of your affairs, that ye stand fast in one spirit, with one mind striving together for the faith of the gospel;
110127.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏧᎵᎶᎲᏍᎦ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎵᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏫᏨᎷᏤᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏫᏨᎪᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᏯᎩᎪᏁᎸᏉ, ᏱᎦᏛᎬᎦ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏥᏙᎬ ᏌᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ, ᏌᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎬᏗ, ᎠᏖᏆᎶᎯ ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ.
110127.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya a-di-na Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv tsu-li-lo-hv-s-ga ni-tsa-dv-ne-li-do-he-s-di; na-s-gi i-yu-no yi-wi-tsv-lu-tse-lv a-le yi-wi-tsv-go-v, a-le ya-gi-go-ne-lv-quo, yi-ga-dv-gv-ga ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv-i, u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsi-do-gv sa-quo a-da-nv-do-gi-hi, sa-quo a-da-nv-te-di gv-di, a-te-qua-lo-hi i-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-di-yi i-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv.

110128.english: And in nothing terrified by your adversaries: which is to them an evident token of perdition, but to you of salvation, and that of God.
110128.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᎨᏣᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᏥᏍᎦᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᎯ ᎨᏥᏛᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏁᎯ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110128.phonetic: A-le tle-s-di go-hu-s-di a-na-dv-ne-hv ge-tsa-tlu-di-s-gi yi-tsi-s-ga-s-da-ne-he-s-di; na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-nv-ne-hi ge-tsi-dv-do-di ge-sv-i, ni-hi-s-gi-ni gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsv-ne-hi e-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-sv-i.

110129.english: For unto you it is given in the behalf of Christ, not only to believe on him, but also to suffer for his sake;
110129.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎡᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏗᏱᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏥᎩᎵᏤᏗᏱ;
110129.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no e-tsi-ne-lv-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv i-yu-s-di, v-tla e-tso-i-yu-di-yi-quo u-wa-sv, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni e-tsi-gi-li-tse-di-yi;

110130.english: Having the same conflict which ye saw in me, and now hear to be in me.
110130.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏍᎩᎪᎡᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ ᎠᏇᎲᎢ.
110130.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya a-di-sv-s-di ge-sv i-tse-hv na-s-gi a-yv tsi-s-gi-go-e-lv-gi, a-le go-hi tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha a-que-hv-i.

110201.english: If there be therefore any consolation in Christ, if any comfort of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any bowels and mercies,
110201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏱ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏄᏬᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎬᏖᏆᎶᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎥᏓᏘᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎮᏍᏗ,
110201.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-yu-no Ga-lo-ne-dv-yi u-ga-li-s-di nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-di ge-se-s-di, i-yu-no a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv a-da-nu-wo-hi-s-di-s-gi gv-wa-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di, i-yu-no gv-te-qua-lo-di ge-se-s-di A-da-nv-do v-da-ti-ne-di ge-sv-i, i-yu-no a-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le u-da-nv-ti ge-sv e-he-s-di,

110202.english: Fulfill ye my joy, that ye be likeminded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind.
110202.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎧᎵᏣ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎬᎢ, ᎤᏠᏱ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒᎢ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ.
110202.phonetic: I-tsi-ka-li-tsa ga-li-e-li-gv-i, u-tlo-yi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi i-tsa-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, u-tlo-yi-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi de-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv-i, u-tlo-yi-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, u-tlo-yi-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi di-tsa-da-nv-do.

110203.english: Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves.
110203.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎠᏢᏈᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ; ᎡᎳᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏕᏨᏅ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎤᏟ ᏂᏕᏥᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᏨᏒ.
110203.phonetic: Tle-s-di go-hu-s-di yi-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di a-di-sv-s-di ge-sv a-le a-se-quo a-tlv-qui-s-di ge-sv gv-di; e-la-di-quo-s-gi-ni ni-de-tsv-nv de-tsa-da-nv-dv i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha u-tli ni-de-tsi-lv-quo-de-s-di a-ni-so-i e-s-ga-quo i-tsv-sv.

110204.english: Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others.
110204.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏳᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎾᏂᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
110204.phonetic: Tle-s-di gi-lo u-wa-sv-quo u-tse-li yu-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di, na-ni-v-s-gi-ni a-ni-so-i na-s-quo u-na-tse-li-ga.

110205.english: Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus:
110205.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏓᏅᏖ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ;
110205.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-de-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo tsu-da-nv-te Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa;

110206.english: Who, being in the form of God, thought it not robbery to be equal with God:
110206.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏣᎦᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎦᏓᎾᏌᎲᏍᎦ ᏰᎵᏍᎨ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏄᏛᏅᎢ.
110206.phonetic: Na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsa-ga-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i, v-tla ga-da-na-sa-hv-s-ga ye-li-s-ge U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv nu-dv-nv-i.

110207.english: But made himself of no reputation, and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men:
110207.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏥᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᏄᏓᏛᏁᎴ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏓᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ;
110207.phonetic: A-se-no na-tsi-lv-quo-dv-na nu-da-dv-ne-le u-wa-sv, a-le a-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di nu-s-dv na-s-gi-ya nu-da-dv-ne-le-i, a-le yv-wi nu-na-s-dv na-s-gi-ya nu-li-s-ta-ne-i;

110208.english: And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross.
110208.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏥᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᏄᏓᏛᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᎯᏍᏛ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏓᎿᎭᏩᏍᏛ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110208.phonetic: A-le yv-wi na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv ge-se-i, u-wa-sv na-tsi-lv-quo-dv-na nu-da-dv-ne-le-i, a-le u-wo-hi-yu-hi-s-dv nu-li-s-ta-ne a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-di-s-gi, na-s-gi da-da-hna-wa-s-dv a-yo-hu-hi-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

110209.english: Wherefore God also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name:
110209.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ ᎤᏌᎳᏓᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎸ ᏧᏙᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᎾᏙᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
110209.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di na-s-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tsa-ti ga-lv-la-di-yu u-sa-la-da-nv, a-le u-ne-lv tsu-do-s-do-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo ni-ga-v tsu-na-do-s-do-di ge-sv-i,

110210.english: That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth;
110210.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᏚᏙᎥ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᏆᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢ ᎠᏁᎯ;
110210.phonetic: Na-s-gi Tsi-sa du-do-v ni-ga-di-yu tsu-na-li-ni-qua-ne-di-yi na-s-quo ga-lv-lo-i a-ne-hi, a-le e-lo-hi a-ne-hi, a-le e-lo-hi ha-wi-ni-di-tlv a-ne-hi;

110211.english: And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
110211.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏗᎦᏃᎦ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
110211.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-di-yu di-ga-no-ga gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-nv-ne-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-wa-ne-hi ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

110212.english: Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
110212.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏉ ᏥᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᏥᎦᏔᎲᏉ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎪᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᎪᏁᎸᎢ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ ᎡᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏥᎾᏰᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎾᏫᏍᎬᎢ;
110212.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsv-ge-yu-i, ni-go-hi-lv-quo tsi-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-go-i, v-tla a-yv tsi-ga-ta-hv-quo i-yu-s-di, go-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-gi-go-ne-lv-i u-tli i-ga-i di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-si e-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi ge-sv-i, i-tsi-na-ye-s-gv a-le de-tsi-na-wi-s-gv-i;

110213.english: For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of his good pleasure.
110213.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏚᎸᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
110213.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di ge-sv de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i na-s-gi i-tsa-du-lv-di-yi a-le na-s-quo di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi.

110214.english: Do all things without murmurings and disputings:
110214.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏗᏣᏓᏕᎵᏎᎲᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏣᏗᏒᎯᎲᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ;
110214.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv go-hu-s-di ni-di-tsa-da-de-li-se-hv-na a-le tsi-tsa-di-sv-hi-hv-na ge-se-s-di;

110215.english: That ye may be blameless and harmless, the sons of God, without rebuke, in the midst of a crooked and perverse nation, among whom ye shine as lights in the world;
110215.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᏥᎳᏫᏎᎲᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏣᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎦᏰᏧᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎢᏣᏓᏑᏴ ᎤᎾᏓᏥᏃᏍᏆᏗᏰᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎪᎸᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎲ ᏕᏥᎸᏌᏓᏗᎭ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏗᏣᏘᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ;
110215.phonetic: Na-s-gi ne-tsi-la-wi-se-hv-na a-le ni-tsa-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-se-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi, ga-ye-tsu-i-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na, i-tsa-da-su-yv u-na-da-tsi-no-s-qua-di-ye-dv a-le u-na-go-lv-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi na-hna a-ne-hv de-tsi-lv-sa-da-di-ha e-lo-hi i-ga di-tsa-ti-s-da-ne-hi na-s-gi-ya-i;

110216.english: Holding forth the word of life; that I may rejoice in the day of Christ, that I have not run in vain, neither laboured in vain.
110216.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏗᎩᏍᏆᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏗᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110216.phonetic: I-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-s-ge-s-di ka-no-he-dv gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi; na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi a-qua-li-he-li-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li i-ga ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi a-se-quo di-gi-s-qua-lv-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, a-le a-se-quo di-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

110217.english: Yea, and if I be offered upon the sacrifice and service of your faith, I joy, and rejoice with you all.
110217.cherokee: ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᏯᏆᏓᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏥᎸ ᎢᏤᎶᎲᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᎪᏁᎭ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎬᎢ.
110217.phonetic: V-v, a-le i-yu ya-qua-da-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv na-hna a-tsi-lv i-tse-lo-hv-i a-le de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv go-hi-yu-di i-tsv-di-s-gv-i, ga-li-e-li-ga, a-le i-tsv-ya-li-go-ne-ha i-tsa-li-he-li-gv-i.

110218.english: For the same cause also do ye joy, and rejoice with me.
110218.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏫᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᏯᎵᎪᎲᏏ ᎠᏴ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎬᎢ.
110218.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo wi-ni-ga-li-s-do-da ni-hi i-tsa-li-he-li-gi, a-le s-gi-ya-li-go-hv-si a-yv ga-li-e-li-gv-i.

110219.english: But I trust in the Lord Jesus to send Timotheus shortly unto you, that I also may be of good comfort, when I know your state.
110219.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎠᏋᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᏗᎹᏗ ᏥᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏤᎲ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᏙᎴᎰᏒᎭ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ.
110219.phonetic: A-se-no u-du-gi a-quv-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi Di-ma-di tsi-nv-s-di-yi di-tse-hv ni-go-hi-lv-na, na-s-gi a-yv na-s-quo o-s-dv a-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di-yi ga-do-le-ho-sv-ha ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv-i.

110220.english: For I have no man likeminded, who will naturally care for your state.
110220.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏲᎩᎾᎵᎪᎭ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎤᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎬᏩᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ.
110220.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no gi-lo yo-gi-na-li-go-ha u-tlo-yi u-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gi, na-s-gi a-se gv-wa-ga-sa-ya-s-do-di ge-sv ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv-i.

110221.english: For all seek their own, not the things which are Jesus Christ's.
110221.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏲᎰᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110221.phonetic: Na-ni-v-ye-no u-nv-sv-quo u-na-tse-li ge-sv u-ni-yo-ho-i, v-tla-no Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li ge-sv-i.

110222.english: But ye know the proof of him, that, as a son with the father, he hath served with me in the gospel.
110222.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᎪᎵᏰᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏙᏓ ᏣᏍᏕᎵᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᎩᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎵᏱᎸᏍᏗᏱ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
110222.phonetic: A-se-no e-tsi-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv na-s-gi a-tsi-go-li-ye-v-i, na-s-gi gi-lo u-we-tsi u-do-da tsa-s-de-li-s-go na-s-gi-ya a-gi-s-de-lv-hi-do-lv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv u-li-yi-lv-s-di-yi da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

110223.english: Him therefore I hope to send presently, so soon as I shall see how it will go with me.
110223.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎠᏋᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᎬᏪᏅᏛ ᎦᏙᎴᎣᏒᏉ ᎢᏯᏉᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
110223.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-du-gi a-quv-ha na-s-gi tsi-nv-s-di-yi i-gv-we-nv-dv ga-do-le-o-sv-quo i-ya-quo-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

110224.english: But I trust in the Lord that I also myself shall come shortly.
110224.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏯᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏋᏒ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ.
110224.phonetic: A-se-no tsi-ya-li-s-ga-s-do-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-li-s-go-lv-do-di-yi a-yv na-s-quo a-quv-sv ni-go-hi-lv-na wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi.

110225.english: Yet I supposed it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus, my brother, and companion in labour, and fellowsoldier, but your messenger, and he that ministered to my wants.
110225.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᎠᏎ ᏱᏥᏅᏒ ᎠᏇᎵᏒ ᎢᏆ'ᎶᏓᏔ ᏫᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏅᏟ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᎾᏖᏆᎶᎯ ᏙᎩᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᎾᎵᎪᎯ ᎣᏍᏗᏯᏫᏍᎩ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᏍᏕᎸᏛ ᎠᎩᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᏂᎪᎯᏎᎲᎢ.
110225.phonetic: A-di-na a-se yi-tsi-nv-sv a-que-li-sv I-qua-'-lo-da-ta wi-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi, na-s-gi a-gi-nv-tli a-le o-gi-na-te-qua-lo-hi do-gi-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, a-le o-gi-na-li-go-hi o-s-di-ya-wi-s-gi, ni-hi-s-gi-ni e-tsi-nv-si-dv, a-le na-s-gi a-gi-s-de-lv-dv a-gi-wa-dv-di-yi a-gi-ni-go-hi-se-hv-i.

110226.english: For he longed after you all, and was full of heaviness, because that ye had heard that he had been sick.
110226.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬᎩ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎨᏛ ᎤᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬᎩ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅ ᎤᏢᏨᎢ.
110226.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-ye-no u-du-li-s-gv-gi i-tsi-go-wa-dv-di-yi ni-tsi-v-i, a-le u-tsa-ti ga-ge-dv u-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv-gi, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi i-tsa-dv-ga-nv u-tlv-tsv-i.

110227.english: For indeed he was sick nigh unto death: but God had mercy on him; and not on him only, but on me also, lest I should have sorrow upon sorrow.
110227.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏢᎬᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎴᏉ ᏄᏲᎱᏒᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏙᎵᏨᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᏏᎶᏛ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
110227.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no u-tlv-gv-gi a-le a-le-quo nu-yo-hu-sv-gi; a-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-do-li-tsv-gi; v-tla a-le na-s-gi-quo u-wa-sv, a-yv-s-gi-ni na-s-quo, na-s-gi u-lo-si-lo-dv u-yo a-qua-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

110228.english: I sent him therefore the more carefully, that, when ye see him again, ye may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.
110228.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᏞᎩᏳ ᏥᏅᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎢᎡᏥᎪᎥᎭ, ᎨᏣᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏲ ᏯᏆᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎦ.
110228.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tli tle-gi-yu tsi-nv-li, na-s-gi hna-quo ta-li-ne i-e-tsi-go-v-ha, ge-tsa-li-he-li-s-di yi-gi, a-le a-yv e-s-ga i-yv-dv u-yo ya-qua-da-nv-ta-wa-de-ga.

110229.english: Receive him therefore in the Lord with all gladness; and hold such in reputation:
110229.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏤᏣᏓᏂᎸᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᎢᏨᏓ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎸᏉᏕᏍᏗ;
110229.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tse-tsa-da-ni-lv-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi di-ka-hna-wa-de-gi ge-sv i-yu-s-di u-tsa-ti o-si-yu a-ye-lv-di i-tsv-da; a-le na-s-gi i-yu-na-s-di de-tsi-lv-quo-de-s-di;

110230.english: Because for the work of Christ he was nigh unto death, not regarding his life, to supply your lack of service toward me.
110230.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᎴᏉ ᏄᏲᎱᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎬᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎷᎶᎬ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎢᏥᏅᎢ.
110230.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no u-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi a-le-quo nu-yo-hu-sv-gi, na-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gv-na gv-nv-i, na-s-gi u-s-qua-di-s-di-yi ga-lu-lo-gv a-qua-li-s-de-lv-do-di i-tsi-nv-i.

110301.english: Finally, my brethren, rejoice in the Lord. To write the same things to you, to me indeed is not grievous, but for you it is safe.
110301.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᏗᏱ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏯᏪᎢᏍᏗ ᏯᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎠᏴ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᏓᎴᏍᎩ.
110301.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no ge-sv i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsa-li-he-li-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv i-yu-s-di.  Hi-a na-s-gi wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-di-yi, u-do-hi-yu-hi v-tla tsu-ya-we-i-s-di ya-gi-ye-lv-ha a-yv, ni-hi-s-gi-ni u-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv i-tsu-da-le-s-gi.

110302.english: Beware of dogs, beware of evil workers, beware of the concision.
110302.cherokee: ᏕᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎩᎵ, ᏕᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ; ᏕᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᎱᏍᏕᏍᎩ.
110302.phonetic: De-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di gi-li, de-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di u-yo tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi; de-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di di-ni-hu-s-de-s-gi.

110303.english: For we are the circumcision, which worship God in the spirit, and rejoice in Christ Jesus, and have no confidence in the flesh.
110303.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏤᎩᎤᏍᏕᏎᎸᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ ᎡᏓᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᎵᎮᎵᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎡᏓᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛᎾ ᏥᎩ.
110303.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no tse-gi-u-s-de-se-lv-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi A-da-nv-do gv-di e-da-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi tsi-gi, a-le i-da-li-he-li-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa e-da-li-s-ga-s-do-dv i-yu-s-di, a-le u-que-da-li ge-sv ni-ga-li-s-ga-s-do-dv-na tsi-gi.

110304.english: Though I might also have confidence in the flesh. If any other man thinketh that he hath whereof he might trust in the flesh, I more:
110304.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎭ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏆᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏰᎵ ᏳᎭ ᏳᏰᎸ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ [ᎠᎩᎭ;]
110304.phonetic: Na-s-quo-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-yv a-gi-ha u-que-da-li ge-sv gv-qua-li-s-ga-s-do-do-di ge-sv-i.  I-yu-no gi-lo ye-li yu-ha yu-ye-lv u-que-da-li ge-sv gv-wa-li-s-ga-s-do-do-di ge-sv-i, a-yv u-tli i-ga-i [a-gi-ha;]

110305.english: Circumcised the eighth day, of the stock of Israel, of the tribe of Benjamin, an Hebrew of the Hebrews; as touching the law, a Pharisee;
110305.cherokee: ᏧᏁᎵᏁ ᎢᎦ ᎥᎩᎱᏍᏕᏎᎸᎩ, ᎢᏏᎵ ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᏇᏂ ᎠᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎨᎳ, ᏥᏈᎷ ᎠᏂᏈᎷ ᏅᏛᏆᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏃ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒ ᏥᏆᎵᏏ;
110305.phonetic: Tsu-ne-li-ne i-ga v-gi-hu-s-de-se-lv-gi, I-si-li u-na-da-tse-li-dv ge-sv nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi, Que-ni a-ni-la-s-da-lv ge-la, Tsi-qui-lu A-ni-qui-lu nv-dv-qua-da-le-nv-hi; di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-no de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-sv Tsi-qua-li-si;

110306.english: Concerning zeal, persecuting the church; touching the righteousness which is in the law, blameless.
110306.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᏕᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᎬᎢ; ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎦᏴᎩᎳᏫᏎᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎩ.
110306.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-dv-no a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, de-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-s-gv-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-gv-i; du-yu-go-dv i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-sv-i, ga-yv-gi-la-wi-se-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-gi.

110307.english: But what things were gain to me, those I counted loss for Christ.
110307.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏆᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᎯ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ.
110307.phonetic: A-se-no ni-ga-v na-s-gi gv-qua-li-s-de-lv-do-di a-gi-ye-lv-nv-i, na-s-gi e-s-ga-quo i-ya-quv-ne-hi a-gi-ye-lv-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-da-ga-li-s-do-da.

110308.english: Yea doubtless, and I count all things but loss for the excellency of the knowledge of Christ Jesus my Lord: for whom I have suffered the loss of all things, and do count them but dung, that I may win Christ,
110308.cherokee: ᎥᎥ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏯᏋᏁᎯ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏓᎪᎾᏛᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᎩᏲᎱᏎᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎢᎸᏗᏉ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎢᏣᏴᏁᏗᏱ,
110308.phonetic: V-v, u-do-hi-yu-hi, a-le ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di e-s-ga i-ya-quv-ne-hi a-gi-ye-lv-ha nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-da-go-na-dv-ta-nv-hi ge-sv tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa a-qua-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi; na-s-gi tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-gi-yo-hu-se-lv-hi tsi-gi, a-le u-ne-i-lv-di-quo a-gi-ye-lv-ha na-s-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv na-s-gi a-qua-tse-li i-tsa-yv-ne-di-yi,

110309.english: And be found in him, not having mine own righteousness, which is of the law, but that which is through the faith of Christ, the righteousness which is of God by faith:
110309.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏥᏯᏁᎶᏛ ᎥᎩᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎠᏆᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎾᎩᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ, Ꮎ-ᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏚᏓᎴᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ.
110309.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi de-tsi-ya-ne-lo-dv v-gi-wa-dv-di-yi, a-qua-du-da-le-s-do-di a-quv-sv a-qua-tse-li na-gi-hv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di gv-wa-da-ne-di tsi-gi, na--s-gi-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hi-yu-di ge-sv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga, na-s-gi a-du-da-le-s-do-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv gv-do-di tsi-gi.

110310.english: That I may know him, and the power of his resurrection, and the fellowship of his sufferings, being made conformable unto his death;
110310.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏇᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏥᏙᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᎩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ;
110310.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi, a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv du-le-hi-sa-nv-i, a-le a-que-la-di-s-di-s-gv na-s-gi u-gi-li-yo-tsi-do-lv-i, a-le u-yo-hu-sv na-s-gi-ya a-gi-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi;

110311.english: If by any means I might attain unto the resurrection of the dead.
110311.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏱᎸᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏩᏆᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
110311.phonetic: Na-s-gi go-hu-s-di nv-da-yu-li-yi-lv-s-do-di-yi a-yo-hu-sv di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv wa-qua-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

110312.english: Not as though I had already attained, either were already perfect: but I follow after, if that I may apprehend that for which also I am apprehended of Christ Jesus.
110312.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏥᏓᎩᏂᏴᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏯᎩᏰᎸᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏛᎯ ᎦᏳᎳ ᏯᎩᏰᎸᎭ; ᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎦᏍᎩᏂ, ᎢᏳ ᏰᎵ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏂᏴᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏥᏓᎩᏂᏴᎲᎩ.
110312.phonetic: V-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv ga-yu-la tsi-da-gi-ni-yv-so na-s-gi-ya ya-gi-ye-lv-ha, v-tla a-le a-gi-s-qua-dv-hi ga-yu-la ya-gi-ye-lv-ha; tsi-s-da-wa-de-ga-s-gi-ni, i-yu ye-li yi-gi, na-s-gi di-gi-ni-yv-di-yi na-s-gi na-s-quo u-gv-wa-li Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa tsi-da-gi-ni-yv-hv-gi.

110313.english: Brethren, I count not myself to have apprehended: but this one thing I do, forgetting those things which are behind, and reaching forth unto those things which are before,
110313.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎠᎩᏂᏴᏛ ᏍᎩᏰᎸᎭ; ᏑᏓᎴᎩᏍᎩᏂ [ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎰᎢ;] ᎠᏋᎨᏫᏍᎪᎢ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎣᏂᏗᏢ ᏄᏍᏗᏕᎬᎢ, ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏄᏍᏗᏕᎬ ᏫᏗᏥᏂᏱᏍᎪᎢ,
110313.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla ga-yu-la a-gi-ni-yv-dv s-gi-ye-lv-ha; su-da-le-gi-s-gi-ni [ni-ga-dv-ne-ho-i;] a-quv-ge-wi-s-go-i tsu-da-le-nv-dv o-ni-di-tlv nu-s-di-de-gv-i, i-gv-yi-di-tlv-no tsu-da-le-nv-dv nu-s-di-de-gv wi-di-tsi-ni-yi-s-go-i,

110314.english: I press toward the mark for the prize of the high calling of God in Christ Jesus.
110314.cherokee: ᏗᎨᏛ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏕᎦᎵᏍᏆᎵᎭ ᎠᏌᏍᏛ ᏗᎩᏂᏴᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏯᏅᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
110314.phonetic: Di-ge-dv i-di-tlv de-ga-li-s-qua-li-ha a-sa-s-dv di-gi-ni-yv-di-yi na-s-gi u-ne-la-nv-hi ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi a-da-ya-nv-do-di ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa a-gv-di-s-gv-i.

110315.english: Let us therefore, as many as be perfect, be thus minded: and if in any thing ye be otherwise minded, God shall reveal even this unto you.
110315.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᎩᏍᏆᏛᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏙᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏨᏁᎵ.
110315.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, a-yv ni-di-v i-gi-s-qua-dv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di i-ga-da-nv-te-s-di; a-le i-yu go-hu-s-di ge-sv nv-wa-da-le nu-s-de-s-di do-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi hi-a na-s-quo gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-tsv-ne-li.

110316.english: Nevertheless, whereto we have already attained, let us walk by the same rule, let us mind the same thing.
110316.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᎾᎿᎭᎦᏳᎳ ᏫᎦᎵᏱᎶᎸᎢ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏕᎦᏁᎶᏗᏗᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
110316.phonetic: A-di-na na-hna ga-yu-la wi-ga-li-yi-lo-lv-i, u-tlo-yi-quo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di de-ga-ne-lo-di-di-se-s-di, u-tlo-yi-quo i-da-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di.

110317.english: Brethren, be followers together of me, and mark them which walk so as ye have us for an ensample.
110317.cherokee: ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏣᏖᏆᎶᎯ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᎠᏁᏙᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏕᎶᏆᎡᎯ ᏥᏕᏍᎩᏯᎧᎭ.
110317.phonetic: I-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsa-te-qua-lo-hi s-gi-s-da-wa-de-gi ge-se-s-di, a-le de-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-de-s-di na-s-gi i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi a-ne-do-hv-i, na-s-gi a-yv s-gi-ya-de-lo-qua-e-hi tsi-de-s-gi-ya-ka-ha.

110318.english: (For many walk, of whom I have told you often, and now tell you even weeping, that they are the enemies of the cross of Christ:
110318.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏔᏰᏃ ᎠᏁᏙᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᎫᏘᎶᏛ ᎦᏥᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎦᎦᏠᏱᎯ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏓᎿᎭᏩᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
110318.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-ta-ye-no a-ne-do-ha, na-s-gi u-wa-gu-ti-lo-dv ga-tsi-ne-i-s-ta-nv-hi i-tsv-no-ne-lv-hi, a-le go-hi ge-sv na-s-quo di-ga-ga-tlo-yi-hi i-tsv-no-ne-ha, na-s-gi a-ni-s-ga-gi ge-sv tsu-da-hna-wa-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga;

110319.english: Whose end is destruction, whose God is their belly, and whose glory is in their shame, who mind earthly things.)
110319.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᏍᏉᎵᏱᏉ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏉ ᎠᎾᏢᏈᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯᏉ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎾᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ.
110319.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-ni-s-qua-di-s-do-di ge-sv a-da-dv-di-s-gi tsi-gi, U-na-ne-la-nv-hi u-ni-s-quo-li-yi-quo tsi-gi, a-le u-na-de-ho-hi-s-di-s-gi-quo a-na-tlv-qui-s-di-s-gi tsi-gi, na-s-gi e-lo-hi-quo e-hi u-na-ga-sa-ya-s-di tsi-gi.

110320.english: For our conversation is in heaven; from whence also we look for the Saviour, the Lord Jesus Christ:
110320.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎢᏕᎯ; ᎾᎿᎭᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏗᎦᏖᏃᎭ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ;
110320.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no ga-lv-la-di i-de-hi; na-hna na-s-quo nv-da-yu-lo-hi-s-di-yi tsi-di-ga-te-no-ha I-gi-s-de-li-s-gi, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv;

110321.english: Who shall change our vile body, that it may be fashioned like unto his glorious body, according to the working whereby he is able even to subdue all things unto himself.
110321.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏁᏟᏴᎡᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏂᏗᎦᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᏗᏗᏰᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏰᎸ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᎶᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏳᏩᏁᏗᏱ.
110321.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-gi-ne-tli-yv-e-di tsi-gi ni-di-ga-lv-quo-dv-na di-di-ye-lv-i, na-s-gi-ya i-tsu-wa-ne-di-yi u-wa-sv ga-lv-quo-di-yu a-ye-lv nu-s-dv-i, na-s-gi-ya u-li-ni-gv-gv gv-di-s-gv ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-wa-sv di-gv-wa-ne-lo-do-di-yi i-yu-wa-ne-di-yi.

110401.english: Therefore, my brethren dearly beloved and longed for, my joy and crown, so stand fast in the Lord, my dearly beloved.
110401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏨᏯᏅᏘ, ᏍᎩᏯᎵᎡᎵᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏚᎶᏙᏗ, ᏅᏩᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏥᏙᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛᎢ, ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ.
110401.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-da-li-nv-tli i-tsv-ge-yu-i a-le u-tsa-ti i-tsv-ya-nv-ti, s-gi-ya-li-e-li-s-di-s-gi a-le a-qua-li-s-du-lo-do-di, nv-wa-s-de-s-di u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsi-do-ge-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-dv-i, i-tsv-ge-yu-i.

110402.english: I beseech Euodias, and beseech Syntyche, that they be of the same mind in the Lord.
110402.cherokee: ᏥᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᏳᎣᏗᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᏏᏂᏗᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎢᏧᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏓᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏒᎢ.
110402.phonetic: Tsi-s-di-ye-di-ha Yu-o-di-ya, a-le tsi-s-di-ye-di-ha Si-ni-di-gi na-s-gi u-tlo-yi-quo i-tsu-nv-ne-di-yi du-na-da-nv-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi da-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-sv-i.

110403.english: And I intreat thee also, true yokefellow, help those women which laboured with me in the gospel, with Clement also, and with other my fellowlabourers, whose names are in the book of life.
110403.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎬᎩᎾᏖᏆᎶᎯ, ᎬᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ Ꮎ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎬᎩᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎸᎯ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎦᎵᏥᏙᏂᏙᎲ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎯᏯᏠᏯᏍᏔᏅᎭ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏞᎻᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎾᏙᎥ ᏥᏕᎪᏪᎳ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ.
110403.phonetic: A-le gv-s-di-ye-di-ha na-s-quo ni-hi ni-tsa-tlo-na-s-dv-na gv-gi-na-te-qua-lo-hi, gv-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi na a-ni-ge-yv gv-gi-s-de-lv-hi-do-lv-hi da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv ga-li-tsi-do-ni-do-hv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, hi-ya-tlo-ya-s-ta-nv-ha na-s-quo Tle-mi-na a-le a-ni-so-i u-tlo-yi tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, na-s-gi du-na-do-v tsi-de-go-we-la gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi go-we-li-hi.

110404.english: Rejoice in the Lord always: and again I say, Rejoice.
110404.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎨᏍᏗ, ᎦᏗᎭ ᏔᎵᏁ.
110404.phonetic: I-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di ni-go-hi-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di; i-tsa-li-he-li-ge-s-di, ga-di-ha ta-li-ne.

110405.english: Let your moderation be known unto all men. The Lord is at hand.
110405.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏅᎢ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᏓᏯᎢ.
110405.phonetic: I-tsa-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv na-nv-i yv-wi a-ni-ga-ta-he-s-di; U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-v-ni-yu da-ya-i.

110406.english: Be careful for nothing; but in every thing by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known unto God.
110406.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏔᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᎵᏠᏯᏍᏗ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏁᏨᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ;
110406.phonetic: Tle-s-di go-hu-s-di yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di; nu-da-le-sv-s-gi-ni go-hu-s-di a-da-do-li-s-do-di a-le a-ta-yo-s-di ge-sv gv-di a-li-he-li-s-di gv-wa-li-tlo-ya-s-di, gv-ni-ge-sv ne-tsv-ne-he-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi nu-s-dv i-tsa-du-li-s-gv-i;

110407.english: And the peace of God, which passeth all understanding, shall keep your hearts and minds through Christ Jesus.
110407.cherokee: ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎦᎶᏒᏍᏗᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎬᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏂᎬᏂᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
110407.phonetic: Nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-ne-di ge-sv, na-s-gi tsi-ga-lo-sv-s-di-ha ni-ga-v gv-da-nv-te-di ge-sv-i, tsu-s-qua-ni-go-do-di ge-se-s-di di-tsi-na-wi a-le di-tsa-da-nv-do, Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa ni-gv-ni-si-s-ge-s-di.

110408.english: Finally, brethren, whatsoever things are true, whatsoever things are honest, whatsoever things are just, whatsoever things are pure, whatsoever things are lovely, whatsoever things are of good report; if there be any virtue, and if there be any praise, think on these things.
110408.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎬᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᏰᎭ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
110408.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no ge-sv-i i-da-li-nv-tli, ni-ga-v ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v o-si-yu gv-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, ni-ga-v o-si-yu a-ni-no-he-s-ge-s-di; i-yu-no o-si-yu i-ya-dv-ne-di ye-ha, i-yu-no go-hu-s-di ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi de-tsa-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di.

110409.english: Those things, which ye have both learned, and received, and heard, and seen in me, do: and the God of peace shall be with you.
110409.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎫᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏍᎩᏯᏕᎶᏆᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏍᎩᏯᏓᏂᎸᏤᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᎪᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
110409.phonetic: Na-s-gi gu-da-le-nv-dv s-gi-ya-de-lo-qua-e-lv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le di-s-gi-ya-da-ni-lv-tse-lv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le s-gi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le s-gi-go-e-lv-hi ge-sv-i, ni-tsa-dv-ne-he-s-di; U-ne-la-nv-hi-no nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-da-s-di ge-se-s-di.

110410.english: But I rejoiced in the Lord greatly, that now at the last your care of me hath flourished again; wherein ye were also careful, but ye lacked opportunity.
110410.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏨᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏬᎯᏨᎯ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏛ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏤᎯᏲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏛᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏣᏜᏓᏅᏓᏕᎮᎢ.
110410.phonetic: A-se-no U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tsa-ti tsi-ya-li-e-li-tsv-gi, na-s-gi hna-quo u-wo-hi-tsv-hi s-gi-ya-nv-dv ta-li-ne a-tse-hi-yo-gi, na-s-gi na-hna u-gv-wa-li na-s-quo s-gi-ya-nv-dv-gi, a-se-no v-tla yi-tsa-dla-nv-da-de-he-i.

110411.english: Not that I speak in respect of want: for I have learned, in whatsoever state I am, therewith to be content.
110411.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎠᎩᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏆᏕᎶᏆᎥᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏕᎬ ᎣᏏᏳᏉ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏗᏱ.
110411.phonetic: V-tla a-di-na a-gi-ni-gv-se-hv tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-gv yi-gi, a-qua-de-lo-qua-v-ye-no ni-ga-v na-qua-li-s-da-ne-li-de-gv o-si-yu-quo a-gi-ye-lv-di-yi.

110412.english: I know both how to be abased, and I know how to abound: every where and in all things I am instructed both to be full and to be hungry, both to abound and to suffer need.
110412.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏱᎾᏆᏛᎿᎭᏕᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏯᎩᎭ; ᏂᎦᎥ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏕᎬᎢ, ᎥᏇᏲᏅ ᎢᏯᏆᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏯᏉᎳᏅ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏯᎩᏲᏏᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏯᎩᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏯᎩᏂᎬᏎᎭ
110412.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-ha i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi e-la-di yi-na-qua-dv-hna-de-ga, a-le tsi-ga-ta-ha i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi u-tsa-ti ya-gi-ha; ni-ga-v de-ge-sa-di-sv-i, a-le ni-ga-v na-qua-li-s-da-ne-li-de-gv-i, v-que-yo-nv i-ya-qua-dv-ne-di-yi na-s-quo ya-quo-la-nv a-le na-s-quo ya-gi-yo-si-ha, na-s-quo u-tsa-ti ya-gi-ha a-le na-s-quo ya-gi-ni-gv-se-ha

110413.english: I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.
110413.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎢᎬᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏆᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᎭ.
110413.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-quo i-gv-qua-dv-ne-di Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv na-s-gi tsa-qua-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-ha.

110414.english: Notwithstanding ye have well done, that ye did communicate with my affliction.
110414.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᏥᏍᎩᏁᎸ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎢᏳᎢ.
110414.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv o-si-yu ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv tsi-s-gi-ne-lv a-qua-li-s-de-lv-do-di tsi-gi-li-yo-gv i-yu-i.

110415.english: Now ye Philippians know also, that in the beginning of the gospel, when I departed from Macedonia, no church communicated with me as concerning giving and receiving, but ye only.
110415.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏈᎵᎩᏱ ᎢᏤᎯ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᏆᏂᎩᏒ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎤᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᎬᏆᏛᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎥᏓᏘᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏒ.
110415.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-hi Qui-li-gi-yi i-tse-hi, i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di na-s-quo, na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv i-gv-yi-yi i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv na-hi-yu Ma-si-do-ni a-qua-ni-gi-sv, v-tla i-lv-hi-tlv u-na-da-tlu-gv tsu-na-ne-lo-di go-hu-s-di yi-gv-qua-dv-ne-le na-s-gi a-da-ne-di a-le v-da-ti-ne-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li, ni-hi i-tsv-sv.

110416.english: For even in Thessalonica ye sent once and again unto my necessity.
110416.cherokee: ᏕᏏᎶᏂᎦᏰᏃ ᏫᎨᏙᎲ ᏌᏉ ᏂᏣᏓᏅᏒᎩ ᎠᎩᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏔᎵᏁᎢ.
110416.phonetic: De-si-lo-ni-ga-ye-no wi-ge-do-hv sa-quo ni-tsa-da-nv-sv-gi a-gi-ni-gv-se-hv a-qua-li-s-de-lv-do-di, a-le na-s-quo ta-li-ne-i.

110417.english: Not because I desire a gift: but I desire fruit that may abound to your account.
110417.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
110417.phonetic: V-tla a-di-na a-qua-du-li-s-gv a-da-ne-di ge-sv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; u-da-ta-nv-hi-s-gi-ni a-qua-du-li-ha u-tsa-ti i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

110418.english: But I have all, and abound: I am full, having received of Epaphroditus the things which were sent from you, an odour of a sweet smell, a sacrifice acceptable, wellpleasing to God.
110418.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎠᎩᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ; ᎠᎩᎧᎵᏬᎯ, ᏗᏆᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏆ'ᎶᏓᏓ ᎤᏲᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏣᏓᏅᏒᎯ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎦᎾᏍᏛ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ, ᎠᏥᎸ ᎨᎳᏍᏗ ᏗᎬᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
110418.phonetic: A-se-no ni-ga-v-quo a-gi-ha a-le u-tsa-ta-nv-hi; a-gi-ka-li-wo-hi, di-qua-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi ge-sv I-qua-'-lo-da-da u-yo-lv-hi na-s-gi nv-da-tsa-da-nv-sv-hi, u-tsa-ti u-ga-na-s-dv ga-wa-sv-gi, a-tsi-lv ge-la-s-di di-gv-da-ni-lv-i-s-di, o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di U-ne-la-nv-hi.

110419.english: But my God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.
110419.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏥᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
110419.phonetic: A-se-no A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di ni-ga-v i-tsi-ni-gv-se-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya u-we-hna-i-yu a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

110420.english: Now unto God and our Father be glory for ever and ever. Amen.
110420.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
110420.phonetic: Hna-quo-no U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le I-gi-do-da ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di ni-go-hi-lv a-le ni-go-hi-lv-i.  E-me-nv.

110421.english: Salute every saint in Christ Jesus. The brethren which are with me greet you.
110421.cherokee: ᏕᏥᏲᎵᎭ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ.  ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏂ ᏦᏤᏙᎭ ᏫᎨᏥᏲᎵᎭ.
110421.phonetic: De-tsi-yo-li-ha na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi.  O-tsa-li-nv-tli a-ni tso-tse-do-ha wi-ge-tsi-yo-li-ha.

110422.english: All the saints salute you, chiefly they that are of Caesar's household.
110422.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏫᎨᏥᏲᎵᎭ, Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏏᏌ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥᎢ.
110422.phonetic: Na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti wi-ge-tsi-yo-li-ha, ho u-gv-wi-yu-ha na-s-gi na Si-sa du-da-ti-na-v-i.

110423.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
110423.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
110423.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di ni-tsi-v-i.  E-me-nv.
